title: brachyscome humilis
intro: Brachyscome humilis, also known as the small daisy or Australian daisy, is a flowering plant native to Australia and New Zealand. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Brachyscome humilis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Brachyscome humilis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
